name: Cleaning The System
short_description: Master unpredictable mechanics and tackle challenging obstacles as you race to the finish, either against the clock or with up to 3 friends in thrilling local multiplayer.
detailed_description:
Cleaning the System is a 2D physics-based platformer that's simple to pick up, but challenging to master. Discover and adapt to each unique mechanic and obstacle, using them to your advantage as you progress. Will you persevere through the trials, or will frustration make you give up? The choice is yours!

Features

  • Different Mechanics: Bouncing, Swimming, Sliding, Launching, Gliding, Floating, Grappling

  • Speedrunning: Race against other players' times to be the fastest

  • Split-screen Multiplayer: Race against 3 other friends on the same screen

  • Level Editor: Create and Play levels created by other players
